description: Summarization regeneration — revises a previously generated article summary based on user feedback.

prompts.instruction:
<Revision_Task>
Apply the User Feedback to the Original Content. Modify only the necessary parts to satisfy the feedback while keeping the rest verbatim.
</Revision_Task>

<Original_Content>
{original_content}
</Original_Content>

<User_Feedback>
{user_feedback}
</User_Feedback>

<Rules>
1. Preserve the existing structure (URL, Title, Summary, Business Relevance).
2. Maintain all Article Summary Standards and Data Integrity protocols.
3. Do NOT expand or rewrite sections not mentioned in the feedback.
</Rules>

Return the fully revised summary now.
